Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, -- Metastatic Site at primary diagnosis. Will be mapped to a measurement value concept in a later ETL step. Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreDiagnosis.MetastaticSite.@code' as MetastaticSite from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HA' and MetastaticSite is not null and MetastaticSite != '97';

Explanation.Description: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED) is the date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: The site of the metastatic disease at PATIENT DIAGNOSIS during a Cancer Care Spell.
